focusPoints.label: Celebrating the payments refactor success
focusPoints.reason: Just shipped the payments refactor on Monday — big win, team noticed. Worth acknowledging the achievement and its impact.

focusPoints.label: Current energy and engagement levels
focusPoints.reason: Looks a bit flat this week, quieter than usual in standup. Could be post-delivery fatigue, personal matters, or just a quiet week — worth exploring.

focusPoints.label: Interest in mentoring opportunities
focusPoints.reason: Mentioned in passing they'd like to do more mentoring. Could be a growth area or a shift in interest — worth discussing how to support this.

focusPoints.label: Upcoming involvement in the billing rewrite
focusPoints.reason: Next quarter they'll probably be pulled into the billing rewrite, which they haven't heard about yet. Important to prepare them and align expectations.

focusPoints.label: Support needed for upcoming projects
focusPoints.reason: No specific signal — standard check-in hygiene. Useful to ensure they have what they need for future responsibilities, especially with the billing rewrite on the horizon.

name: Priya
notes: Just shipped the payments refactor on Monday — big win, team noticed. Looks a bit flat this week, quieter than usual in standup. Mentioned in passing they'd like to do more mentoring; we haven't talked about that in a few months. Next quarter they'll probably be pulled into the billing rewrite, which they haven't heard about yet.
